'''Sucharme''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] affiliated with the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. The Federation's primary [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]], [[Tallaga Garrison]], was located in the city of [[Tallaga]].

==Trade Federation invasion==
{{Quote|We hope to quell armed resistance to our perfectly legitimate action to reclaim our lost assets.|[[Budmle Otbor]]|<ref name="Galactic Campaign Guide">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>}}
When the government of Sucharme failed to pay an outstanding debt, the Trade Federation blockaded the planet and launched an invasion on the pretext of forcing the natives to repay their debt. However, the local armed forces, including [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Veril Acamma]], opposed the Federation invasion, and the would-be occupation force was ousted from Sucharme. Despite its loss, the Federation had proven its ability to effectively set up a planetary blockade, and the lessons learned at Sucharme helped during the planning of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Blockade of Naboo]].
